name: walkojas-boop/linkpulse
description: URL reality check for AI agents. POST a URL, get back status + SHA-256 content hash + classification (alive_html, alive_json_api, dead, login_wall, challenge_wall, rate_limited, moved_permanent, ...) + agent-readability score 0-100 + title/meta-description + wayback-machine fallback when dead. Cached 10 min, $0.001 per call. Content-drift detection via /v1/diff. SSRF-blocked. Live at https://linkpulse-neon.vercel.app/.
